RENTED CAR FROM ENTERPRISE CAR RENTAL  (734)451-2499.  CAR LOST POWER ON TWO OCCASIONS WHILE DRIVING.  FIRST TIME AROUND 9:00 AM GOING EAST ON 401 IN CANADA,  SECOND TIME AROUND 8:00 PM GOING WEST ON 402 IN CANADA.  LOST POWER STEERING, ENGINE POWER, POWER BRAKES AND HEADLIGHTS.

narrative.headline: What 2015 Ford Fusion owners report most
narrative.summary: Engine complaints make up the largest share of owner reports, with the most common pattern being sudden, complete loss of power while driving — the car shuts off mid-highway, the dashboard goes dark, and the accelerator stops responding. Steering and power train complaints follow a similar theme of unexpected power loss, sometimes while the vehicle is in motion on a highway. Service brake complaints round out the top concerns, with some incidents also involving fires or crashes.

issues.sample: I WAS DRIVING SOUTHBOUND ON I-75 ALMOST TO PERRYSBURG IN THE MIDDLE LANE AND MY CAR COMPLETELY SHUT OFF. MY CAR WAS STILL IN DRIVE, BUT ALL THE LIGHTS ON MY DASH WENT BLACK AND WHEN I PRESSED ON THE GAS PEDAL I WASN'T GOING ANYWHERE. THERE WAS A TRUCK NEXT TO ME IN THE RIGHT HAND
issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle completely shutting off while driving at highway speeds, with all dashboard lights going dark and the accelerator ceasing to respond, even while the transmission remains in drive. · 1 fire

issues.sample: RENTED CAR FROM ENTERPRISE CAR RENTAL  (734)451-2499.  CAR LOST POWER ON TWO OCCASIONS WHILE DRIVING.  FIRST TIME AROUND 9:00 AM GOING EAST ON 401 IN CANADA,  SECOND TIME AROUND 8:00 PM GOING WEST ON 402 IN CANADA.  LOST POWER STEERING, ENGINE POWER, POWER BRAKES AND HEADLIGHTS.
issues.title: Steering
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle losing power on multiple occasions while driving, including during highway travel, with the loss occurring suddenly and repeating. · 3 crash · 1 injured

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle losing all power and becoming inaccessible, requiring a tow, with the dealership diagnosing a dead battery as the cause. · 5 crash · 1 injured

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle losing power while in motion on highways, with some incidents associated with fires or crashes. · 2 fire · 12 crash · 5 injured
